_instructions: ⚠️ IMPORTANT: Update this file before every release! See CLAUDE.md section '📦 版本发布检查清单' for instructions.

changes: Refreshed the app icon and status bar icon resources
Added launch marketing copy, channel drafts, asset shot lists, and readiness notes
Renamed internal SwiftPM package targets and executable to TwentyGuard
Reset local statistics and session storage to the TwentyGuard application support path
Removed legacy 20-20-20 settings and data migration paths
Renamed the statistics database to twentyguard_stats.db
Published a Developer ID signed and Apple-notarized DMG for direct download
Renamed the public app brand and bundle to TwentyGuard
Updated build, install, and DMG packaging paths for TwentyGuard.app
Added migration for existing 20-20-20 user settings
Added a marketing workspace for launch planning
Moved Night Screen Lock next to the mode controls in the main menu
Shortened the Tonight rhythm row and moved detailed stages into a submenu
Refined the night screen lock menu with a compact rhythm summary and testing escape submenu
Replaced the night lock dialog card with a full-screen status overlay
Reworked the eye health report around a verdict-first dashboard
Aligned the seven-day table with date, work, completion, and postpone columns
Added optional night screen lock with evening wind-down stages
Added configurable wind-down, full-lock, and morning unlock times
Added full-screen night lock overlay with countdown and testing escape
Reduced work-cycle duration automatically during night wind-down
Added 15, 25, 35, and 45 minute custom screen usage duration options
Removed the manual refresh button from the eye health report
Refresh statistics automatically whenever the report is opened
Close the health report when a break starts so it does not reappear after the break
Aligned the seven-day daily rows with fixed-width columns
Rebuilt the eye health report with a scrollable dashboard layout
Added a tested statistics engine for daily and seven-day health metrics
Excluded short restart fragments and stale long sessions from health totals
Separated break completion rate, postponed sessions, and total postpone actions
Added data quality warnings for incomplete break and postpone records
Changed the default cumulative postpone limit to 5 minutes
Added a custom-mode postpone limit selector with 5-minute and 10-minute options
Improved statistics queries for the current JSON-backed session model
Fixed build metadata and SwiftPM resource configuration
Smart system wake behavior: automatically start fresh work session after sleep/screensaver
Postpone mechanism with 10-minute cumulative limit to prevent abuse
Enhanced health statistics with comprehensive event tracking
Improved session recovery after system events
Initial release with 20-20-20 rule implementation
Menu bar application with full-screen break overlay
Multi-monitor support
5 languages: English, 简体中文, Español, 日本語, 한국어
Custom work/break duration settings
Eye health statistics tracking
